added: Video player previous and next controls - the in-app video player now shows previous and next buttons for adjacent saved videos
improved: Master workflow controller - GitHub Actions now route build, nightly, release, and cleanup behavior through one master.yml controller workflow
Nightly artifact delivery - the latest successful main build is now exposed through a stable nightly.link APK artifact
Player control polish - the in-app video player now spaces previous and next controls more comfortably and softens swipe HUD feedback
CodeQL controller wiring - CodeQL can now be enabled from the shared workflow controller
